title: Visible Surface Compression
goal: Implement #352-#354: inventory current visible product surfaces, compress one generated adapter path, and prove the compact report remains a router.
non_goals: Create a dashboard, score, or host-specific workflow dependency.

intent.outcome: The next subtraction slice has a compact surface inventory, generated adapters are thinner, and report router shape is guarded by tests.
intent.constraints: Stay on master; keep package behavior repo-/agent-/tool-/language-agnostic; use package workflow surfaces throughout.
intent.latitude: Choose the smallest adapter compression and report-shape test that satisfy the issues.
intent.escalation: Stop before deleting startup adapters or changing branch.

execution.next_step: Archive this plan after reconcile/summary confirm no live residue.
execution.proof: Use agentic-workspace proof --changed, root/package tests, ruff, maintainer surfaces, planning checks, reconcile, summary.

invariants: Generated adapters stay non-authoritative and contract-backed.
Default report remains a router; deep detail stays behind selectors or full profile.
Archived execplans must expose closeout distillation buckets.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Strip visible product residue that no longer earns its keep while preserving leverage.

required_continuation.activation trigger: Fresh issue or measured friction under #230 after #352-#354 close.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Next product-compression work can choose a subtraction target from a compact inventory instead of broad rediscovery.
iterative_follow_through.intentionally deferred: A full product-shape cleanup of every visible surface and any deletion of weak-agent adapters.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The package had duplicate startup-policy checks in root, installed, and payload copies; product-shape compression must keep validation expectations compressed in lockstep with generated adapters.
iterative_follow_through.proof achieved now: Visible-surface inventory exists; generated adapters route through start and no longer carry authority/routing tables; default report shape is guarded by tests.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: None for #352-#354 after final reconcile and archive.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: #230 remains open for future measured product-residue reductions.

intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Reingest current issues and implement the next open product-compression child issues end-to-end.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Implement #352, #353, and #354 in order; keep #230 open.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Check that this pass removes or guards visible residue rather than adding another first-line concept.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: Planning state/evidence/reviews/execplan, generated adapter renderer outputs, report tests, planning package renderer/tests, and any directly required payload mirrors.
execution_bounds.max changed files: Prefer under 15 files including generated outputs.
execution_bounds.required validation commands: agentic-workspace proof --changed; root workspace CLI tests; planning package tests; ruff; maintainer surfaces; planning checks; reconcile; summary.
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Removing an adapter entirely or changing public command names.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Branch switching, provider-specific workflow dependencies, or broad unrelated contract extraction.

stop_conditions.stop when: #352-#354 are implemented, closed, evidenced, and this plan archives with no warnings.
stop_conditions.escalate when boundary reached: Inventory points to removals larger than one bounded slice.
stop_conditions.escalate on scope drift: Work expands beyond visible-surface compression/report-router proof.
stop_conditions.escalate on proof failure: Proof-selected validation fails outside touched surfaces.

context_budget.live working set: preflight, open issue bodies, operational_compression report, adapter renderer, report tests, this execplan
context_budget.recoverable later: full historical review set and archived execplans
context_budget.externalize before shift: Update execution_run and closeout_distillation before archive.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Before broad surface inventory rereads or after validation failure.

delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Stay on master; keep behavior portable and generated adapters non-authoritative.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact inventory artifact format, adapter wording, and report-shape guard thresholds.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The smallest useful compression would delete or rename a startup surface.

immediate_next_action: Archive this completed plan and leave #230 as the only open continuation.
invariants: Do not make GitHub a shipped package dependency.
Do not add a new first-line product concept for the inventory.
contract_decisions_to_freeze: Report router shape should be tested as compact, with raw high-volume detail behind full profile or section selectors.
Generated adapters should route to compact package queries instead of restating broad doctrine.
open_questions_to_close: Closed: compress generated adapters behind start/summary/proof while preserving weak-agent compatibility.
validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests
cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py
cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
completion_criteria: Visible-surface inventory exists and identifies candidates.
At least one generated adapter is shorter or better routed to compact queries.
Default report router shape is guarded by tests.
No active execplan remains after archive closeout.

execution_run.handoff source: uv run agentic-workspace preflight --format json; gh issue list --state open; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; uv run agentic-workspace report --section operational_compression
execution_run.what happened: Implemented #352-#354: added a compact visible-surface inventory review artifact, compressed generated startup adapters behind compact commands, updated renderer/check payloads, and added default-report router-shape guard coverage.
execution_run.scope touched: Planning state/evidence, generated adapter renderers and payload copies, adapter outputs, planning-surface checks, report CLI/test coverage, and the review inventory artifact.
execution_run.changed surfaces: AGENTS.md, llms.txt, tools/AGENT_QUICKSTART.md, tools/AGENT_ROUTING.md, docs/reviews/visible-product-surface-inventory-2026-04-26.md, renderer/check sources, planning state/evidence, and tests.
execution_run.validations run: proof --changed; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run python scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py .agentic-workspace/planning/scripts/check/check_planning_surfaces.py; cd packages/planning && uv run pytest tests/test_installer.py tests/test_check_planning_surfaces.py; cd packages/planning && uv run ruff check .
execution_run.result for continuation: #352, #353, and #354 are closed; #230 remains open as the broader product-compression umbrella.
execution_run.next step: Run reconcile/summary and archive this completed plan.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; the pass compressed existing surfaces and added only a review artifact justified by #352.
finished_run_review.intent served: yes; product shape is smaller at first contact and guarded against default-report bloat.
finished_run_review.config compliance: used package workflow surfaces, stayed on master, preserved portability, and kept GitHub as external evidence only.
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; #230 remains open and adapter deletion was intentionally deferred.
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: archive this slice; continue future product-shape compression under #230.

proof_report.validation proof: proof selected planning_surfaces, maintainer_surfaces, planning_package, and workspace_cli with surface_value_review accepted and flagged_count 0.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: Maintainer surfaces, planning-surface check, planning doctor, root CLI tests, root ruff, planning package tests, and planning package ruff passed.

intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The refreshed child issues #352, #353, and #354 were implemented and closed with validation comments, but the broader #230 product-compression umbrella remains open.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Reduce total successful-completion cost across restart, handoff, review, and proof loops.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Prefer compact queryable routing and generated adapter compression over new durable public surfaces.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Did this pass make the public product shape smaller or easier to trust?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The child issues are complete, but product-shape compression is an ongoing umbrella outcome.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Review inventory plus renderer/check/report tests identify and protect the current compression targets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: A generated adapter or default report grows independent doctrine or high-volume payload by default.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Visible surface inventory, generated adapter compression, and default report router guard.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: Review inventory is checked in under docs/reviews as evidence/history, not a startup surface.
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (Memory/Docs/Config): No Memory promotion needed; validation guard updates captured recurring checker friction.

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail is retained only in this archived proof record.

continuation.summary: #230 remains open for future product-shape compression after #352-#354.

drift_log: 2026-04-26: Promoted #352-#354 from refreshed live issue state after preflight, summary, and operational-compression dogfood.
2026-04-26: Closed #352-#354 after compressing generated adapters, adding report router guard coverage, and updating startup-policy drift checks.
